help_menu: 🎵 Jatt Music Bot — Help Tap a category below to explore available commands. All commands work with /
help_admins: 🔧 Admin Commands: /pause — Pause the ongoing stream. /resume — Resume the paused stream. /skip — Skip the current track. /stop — Stop the stream. /seek [seconds] — Seek forward. /seekback [seconds] — Seek backward. /reload — Reload the admin cache.
help_auth: 🔐 Auth Commands: Authorized users can control the stream without being admin. /auth — Add a user to authorized list. /unauth — Remove a user from authorized list.
help_blist: 🚫 Blacklist Commands: Blacklisted chats/users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [id] — Blacklist a chat or user. /unblacklist [id] — Remove from blacklist.
help_lang: 🌐 Language Commands: This bot supports multiple languages. /lang — Change the bot language.
help_ping: 📡 Info Commands: /help — Show this help menu. /ping — Check latency and system stats. /start — Start the bot. /sudolist — List sudo users.
help_play: ▶️ Play Commands: Play music in your voice chat. /play [song / URL / reply] — Play audio. /vplay [song / URL / reply] — Play video. -f — Force play (skip queue). /nowplaying — Show current track. /queue — Show the queue. /clearqueue — Clear the queue (keeps current). /move [from] [to] — Move a track in queue. /remove [pos] — Remove a track from queue. /history — Show recently played tracks. Example: /play -f attention
help_queue: 📋 Queue Commands: /queue — View the current queue. /clearqueue — Clear all queued tracks. /move [from] [to] — Move a track in queue. /remove [pos] — Remove a specific track. /history — Show recently played tracks.
help_stats: 📊 Stats Commands: /stats — Show the bot's statistics.
help_sudo: 🛡 Sudo Commands: /ac — Active call count. /activevc — List active calls. /broadcast [reply] — Broadcast a message. -nochat: exclude groups -user: include users -copy: remove forward tag /eval — Execute code. /logs — Send the log file. /logger [on|off] — Toggle logger. /restart — Restart the bot. /addsudo / /rmsudo — Manage sudo users. /setprefix [char] — Set custom command prefix.

Welcome to Jatt Music Bot 𝗝𝗮𝘁𝘁 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗕𝗼𝘁 is your ultimate Punjabi & desi music companion for Telegram voice chats! 🎧 Play music from YouTube 📋 Queue up to 20 tracks 🎬 Video playback support 🌍 Multi-language support 🔀 Shuffle, move & manage queue 🕘 Play history tracking Add me to your group and let the vibes roll! 🔥
